shortAnswer: Cholesterol is an essential blood fat, but high levels can increase cardiovascular risk. Values above 200 mg/dl are considered borderline. What matters most is the ratio of LDL to HDL. Discuss elevated values with your doctor.
metaDescription: Cholesterol elevated? Normal ranges, cardiovascular risk, and causes of high total cholesterol: explained simply.
pageTitle: TC value: Total Cholesterol explained | Medyra
